name: BuildJet
description: Faster + cheaper GitHub Actions runners (~$0.004/min for 2 vCPU/8 GB). Drop-in replacement: change `runs-on` to a buildjet-* label. The BuildJet API is account-management only (organizations, billing, runner usage); the actual build dispatch happens through GitHub Actions. Use github + buildjet together.

credential_fields.name: token
credential_fields.label: API Token
credential_fields.description: Personal or organization API token from BuildJet dashboard

tools.name: list_organizations
tools.description: List BuildJet organizations the token has access to.

tools.name: get_usage
tools.description: Get runner usage / billing minutes for an organization. Args: org_id, period? (current_month|last_month|YYYY-MM).

tools.name: list_runs
tools.description: List recent workflow runs that used BuildJet runners. Args: org_id, limit?.

tools.name: list_caches
tools.description: List cache entries (BuildJet provides drop-in replacement for actions/cache). Args: org_id, repository?.

tools.name: delete_cache
tools.description: Evict a cache entry by key. Args: org_id, cache_id.
